chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6839 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.32812/2016 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Ms. Umaimah Mansoor Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Nosherwan Adil advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this petition may be disposed of with directions that the petitioner shall contest the impugned notice before the issuing authority; issuing authority shall contest the notice vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner; pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
